lines: Yes’ arush’ abandi bose—Kudukunda; Arush' ukw abavandimw —Bakundana.Nahw izindi nshuti zacu Zaduhararuka zose, Yesu ntabw’ ahemukira—Ab’ akunda.
N'iki gihesh’ ubugingo—Budashira ? S’ ukumenya Yesu wacu—Udukunda
?Twarazimiye nk'intama. Yes' aradushakashaka, Atubony’ atwinjiz' ubwo—Mu rugo rwe
Tumumenye kw ar' inshuti—Yishimira Kuduh' imigisha yose—N'imbabazi.Imitima
yac’ ikunda Kumvir’ iyi Nshuti yacu No kumwizigira cyane—Tudatinya.
Kand’ ibyaha byacu byari—Bikabije: Yes’ aterwa n'urukundo—Kudupfira :Ni byo
bituneshereza; Ni byo biturind' ibibi, Tukayoboka yanzira—Iger’ i We.
